name: tapflow
description: Self-hosted iOS/Android simulator streaming and remote control for QA teams.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/agent-core && npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/dashboard && npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/relay && npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/ios-agent && npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/android-agent && npm run build --workspace=@tapflow/cli
scripts.dev: concurrently -n relay,dashboard,ios,android -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:relay" "npm run dev --workspace=@tapflow/dashboard" "npm run dev:ios-agent" "npm run dev:android-agent"
